title: RPG ReviveRush
description: Add the ability to temporarily speed up after reviving in Minecraft!
body:
### **What is RPG ReviveRush?**
This mod grants you a temporary burst of speed after being respawned, giving you the momentum needed to rejoin the fight. No more sluggish recoveries—get back in action instantly!

#### **Features:**
- Gain a short speed boost upon revival.
- Configurable effect duration and intensity.
- Compatible with most revival mechanics from other mods.
#### **How to use:**
1. Get respawned by your bed, anchor or another method.
2. Instantly receive a speed boost.

~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~

This mod is perfect for fast-paced combat, cooperative play, and high-stakes survival moments!
